mapper.insert: MERGE INTO mcp_gateway (gateway_id, gateway_name, gateway_desc, version, auth, status, update_time) KEY(gateway_id) VALUES (#{gatewayId}, #{gatewayName}, #{gatewayDesc}, #{version}, #{auth}, #{status}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_gateway SET auth = #{auth}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, gateway_id, gateway_name, gateway_desc, version, auth, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_gateway ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, gateway_id, gateway_name, gateway_desc, version, auth, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_gateway
AND gateway_id like concat('%', #{gatewayId}, '%')
AND gateway_name like concat('%', #{gatewayName}, '%')
ORDER BY update_time DESC
LIMIT #{limitStart}, #{limitCount}

SELECT count(id) FROM mcp_gateway
AND gateway_id like concat('%', #{gatewayId}, '%')
AND gateway_name like concat('%', #{gatewayName}, '%')
